name: SDL2 Display on host platform
description: The `sdl` display platform allows you to use create an ESPHome display on a desktop system running Linux or MacOS. This is particularly useful for designing display layouts, since compiling and running a host binary is much faster than compiling for and flashing a microcontroller target system.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `1s`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description: Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.

config_entries.label: Sdl Options
config_entries.description: Build arguments if required to specify include or library paths. Should not be required if SDL2 is properly installed.

config_entries.label: Window Options
config_entries.description: Options that affect how the display renders on the host system. All default to false, except position, which defaults to SDL's undefined position

config_entries.label: Always On Top
config_entries.description: Whether to always draw the display window above other windows or not

config_entries.label: Borderless
config_entries.description: Whether to draw the display window with or without borders

config_entries.label: Fullscreen
config_entries.description: Whether to draw the display window in fullscreen or not. This may resize the resolution of the host display to match the SDL display dimensions

config_entries.label: Resizable
config_entries.description: Whether the display window can be manually resized

config_entries.label: Skip Taskbar
config_entries.description: Whether to skip adding a taskbar icon for the display window or not
